assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: The trustify-backend row in result.md is identical to configured.md: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. All four column values (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) match exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: Result.md line 17 contains a new row not present in configured.md: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. The Serena Instance column value is 'serena_ui' as required.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: The Jira Configuration section in result.md (lines 20-25) is identical to configured.md (lines 19-24): Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747. No fields added, removed, or modified.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## PRESERVED' section listing trustify-backend Registry entry, all Jira Configuration fields, Code Intelligence content, and Bug Configuration. It has a separate '## ADDED' section listing the trustify-ui Registry entry and serena_ui limitation entry. The distinction between preserved and added is explicit and clear.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md states: 'serena_backend: Already configured in the Repository Registry (trustify-backend, Rust backend service, path /home/user/trustify-backend). No changes needed.' and 'serena_ui: Newly discovered from the MCP tool listing. Not present in the existing Repository Registry. Added as: trustify-ui, TypeScript frontend, path /home/user/trustify-ui.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: Result.md preserves the entire Code Intelligence section verbatim from configured.md: the naming convention paragraph ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name...'), the mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol example block, and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is line 43: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: Result.md Bug Configuration (lines 45-49) matches configured.md exactly: Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks. Discovery-log.md confirms: 'Bug Configuration is already up to date. All fields present: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks). No changes needed.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: The configured.md has no Security Configuration section. discovery-log.md states: 'No existing Security Configuration section found. Security triage opt-in was offered to the user. User declined to enable security triage. No Security Configuration section added.' Result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section - it ends after Bug Configuration at line 50.
